commit_scope: Sharpen the field-relay spec's breath 3 into a concrete identity model (person-root keypair -> NodeID derived from root pubkey; per-device subkeys delegated by the root so one person spans Mac/Windows/Android; identify = sign; peers verify + TOFU-pin; social attribution via the 37-provider TOFU layered on top). Correct over-stated identity language to unbuilt design; re-number breaths (identity = 3, device carriers + E2E = 4). Docs/spec-only change.

local_validation.notes: Spec-quality gate passes; indexes already up to date. Design/spec change only -- no recipe or runtime change. The fr-route recipe + field-relay-band remain four-way (Go/Rust/TS/fkwu, verdict 127) and native-binary identical as already proven and merged to main; this commit does not touch them.

ci_validation.notes: PR #3593 is spec-only; validate-thread-process and GitGuardian green; windows-floor running at evidence-write time. The commit-evidence gate (thread-gates.yml) is non-blocking.

deploy_validation.summary: docs-only -- no runtime deploy applies; the live relay endpoint and decision recipe are unchanged by this spec edit.

phase_gate.gate: Capture the breath-3 identity model as durable design and correct unbuilt-vs-built language. Building the identity crypto (keypair gen, NodeID derivation, subkey delegation+revocation, signing, recipient verification + TOFU pinning) is a future contract, specced when that breath is taken.
